name: Master Chief || Insomnia
description:
It’s quiet on the Observation Deck, a place that Master Chief finds solace in. He can’t sleep, more so when Cortana keeps suggesting to indulge in his sexuality to curb his insomnia.

It’s easy to dismiss until you walk in. Past your curfew.

Not a request, just something I thought off. I swear I’ll get back to my requests promise. Also working on that Discord server (aka trying to psych myself up to actually make it)

Bot Details:

> Smut with some plot

> Shy Chief (maybe if the API writes him right)

> Marine user

> No CWs

Requests are still closed sorry :( I wanna try being like the cool creators that make their description pretty so I’ll figure it out eventually.

This was also an excuse to see flustered Chief (maybe)
